<style>
.tp-lib{position:fixed;right:0;top:27%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:9999;filter:drop-shadow(-2px 0 6px rgba(251,207,232,.3))}
.tp-trig3{box-sizing:border-box;width:26px;padding:14px 4px;background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #FBCFE8;border-right:none;border-radius:12px 0 0 12px;color:#DB2777;cursor:pointer;writing-mode:vertical-rl;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-align:center;transition:all 0.2s ease}
.tp-trig3:hover{background:#FDF2F8;border-color:#F9A8D4}
.tp-bubble{position:absolute;right:28px;top:calc(50% - 40px);transform:translateY(-50%);background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #FBCFE8;border-radius:14px;padding:14px;padding-top:42px;width:290px;max-height:480px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-sizing:border-box;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(251,207,232,.2)}
.tp-close{position:absolute;top:8px;right:10px;width:26px;height:26px;background:#FFF;border:2px solid #FBCFE8;border-radius:50%;color:#DB2777;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;line-height:22px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s ease}
.tp-close:hover{background:#FDF2F8;border-color:#F9A8D4}
.tp-tabs{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;width:100%;margin-bottom:10px;flex-shrink:0}
.tp-tab{padding:7px 2px;background:#FFF;border:2px solid #FBCFE8;border-radius:10px;color:#DB2777;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s ease;box-sizing:border-box}
.tp-tab:nth-child(1),.tp-tab:nth-child(2){flex:0 0 calc(50% - 2px)}
.tp-tab:nth-child(3),.tp-tab:nth-child(4),.tp-tab:nth-child(5){flex:0 0 calc(33.333% - 3px)}
.tp-tab:hover{background:#FDF2F8;border-color:#F9A8D4}
.tp-tab.tp-act{background:#F9A8D4;color:#FFF;border-color:#F9A8D4}
.tp-content{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding-right:4px;margin-bottom:10px;min-height:0;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:#F9A8D4 #FDF2F8}
.tp-content::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}.tp-content::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#FDF2F8;border-radius:3px}.tp-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#F9A8D4;border-radius:3px}
.tp-grp{width:100%}
.tp-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#DB2777;text-align:center;padding:6px 0}
.tp-line{height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#FBCFE8 20%,#F9A8D4 50%,#FBCFE8 80%,transparent);margin:3px 0 10px;border-radius:1px}
.tp-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;width:100%}
.tp-btn{flex:0 0 calc(33.333% - 4px);padding:9px 3px;background:#FFF;border:2px solid #FBCFE8;border-radius:10px;color:#DB2777;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.2s ease}
.tp-btn:hover{background:#FDF2F8;border-color:#F9A8D4;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.tp-clear{width:100%;padding:9px;background:#F9A8D4;border:2px solid #F9A8D4;border-radius:10px;color:#FFF;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;box-sizing:border-box;transition:all 0.2s ease}
.tp-clear:hover{background:#F472B6;border-color:#F472B6}
</style>

<style>
:root{
  /* 统一气泡变量（默认按夜间，更黑+更淡） */
  --bubble-bg-left: rgba(22,28,36,0.92);
  --bubble-bg-right: rgba(26,32,40,0.92);
  --bubble-border: #4b6f9e;
  --bubble-text: #f5fbff;
  --bubble-shadow:
    0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.6),
    inset 0 0 10px rgba(120,180,255,0.12);

  --panel-bg: rgba(22,28,36,0.95);
  --panel-border: #4b6f9e;
  --panel-text: #f5fbff;
}

/* 日间覆盖：保证清晰可见 */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: light){
  :root{
    --bubble-bg-left: rgba(240,247,255,0.98);
    --bubble-bg-right: rgba(233,243,255,0.98);
    --bubble-border: #a8c4e6;
    --bubble-text: #1f2328;
    --bubble-shadow:
      0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15),
      inset 0 0 10px rgba(120,180,255,0.08);

    --panel-bg: rgba(240,247,255,0.95);
    --panel-border: #a8c4e6;
    --panel-text: #1f2328;
  }
}

/* 所有"气泡/卡片/弹层"统一清晰化 */
.prologue-scope .prologue-content,
.msg-option-scope .msg-content-box,
.msg-option-scope .msg-options-box,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content,
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope,
.chat .chat-bottom .shortcut-button-scope .item,
.model-setting-scope .power-scope,
.model-setting-scope .stream-switch-scope,
.confirm-scope,
.confirm-edit-scope,
.model-help-scope .content,
.history-setting-scope .history-item,
.conversation-list-scope .conversation-item,
.custom-instruction-scope .content-scope .item{
  background: var(--panel-bg) !important;
  color: var(--panel-text) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border) !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  box-shadow: var(--bubble-shadow);
}

/* 聊天气泡（左右） */
.chat .chat-scope-box .content.left,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content.right{
  border: 1px solid var(--bubble-border) !important;
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  color: var(--bubble-text) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  box-shadow: var(--bubble-shadow);
}

.chat .chat-scope-box .content.left{
  background: var(--bubble-bg-left) !important;
}
.chat .chat-scope-box .content.right{
  background: var(--bubble-bg-right) !important;
}

/* 仅普通文本加可读性，不碰代码区 */
.chat .chat-scope-box .content.left > :not(pre):not(code),
.chat .chat-scope-box .content.right > :not(pre):not(code){
  text-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}
@media (prefers-color-scheme: light){
  .chat .chat-scope-box .content.left > :not(pre):not(code),
  .chat .chat-scope-box .content.right > :not(pre):not(code){
    text-shadow: none;
  }
}

/* ===== 关键：保护代码块/状态栏文字，不再被统一颜色覆盖 ===== */
.chat .chat-scope-box .content pre,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content code,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .hljs,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .hljs *,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .code-toolbar,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .code-toolbar *,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .code-header,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .code-header *,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .code-status,
.chat .chat-scope-box .content .code-status *{
  color: unset !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 棕色字体 -> 蓝色强调 */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  .chat .item .touch-scope .content.left font[color="#DC8333"] {
    color: #79c1ff !important;
    font-weight: bold !important;
    font-style: italic !important;
  }
}
@media (prefers-color-scheme: light) {
  .chat .item .touch-scope .content.left font[color="#DC8333"] {
    color: #005fcc !important;
    font-weight: bold !important;
    font-style: italic !important;
  }
}

/* ===== 仅修复输入框可读性（日/夜）===== */
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope textarea,
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope input,
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea textarea,
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea input{
  opacity: 1 !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: currentColor !important;
  caret-color: #56a8ff !important;
}

/* placeholder 统一可见 */
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope textarea::placeholder,
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope input::placeholder,
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea textarea::placeholder,
.chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea input::placeholder{
  opacity: 1 !important;
}

/* 夜间：深底浅字 */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark){
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope{
    background: rgba(22,28,36,0.96) !important;
    border: 1px solid #4b6f9e !important;
  }

  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope textarea,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope input,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea textarea,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea input{
    color: #f5fbff !important;
  }

  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope textarea::placeholder,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope input::placeholder,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea textarea::placeholder,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea input::placeholder{
    color: #c9dbef !important;
  }
}

/* 日间：浅底深字 */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: light){
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope{
    background: rgba(240,247,255,0.98) !important;
    border: 1px solid #a8c4e6 !important;
  }

  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope textarea,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope input,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea textarea,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea input{
    color: #1f2328 !important;
  }

  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope textarea::placeholder,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea .chat-input-scope input::placeholder,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea textarea::placeholder,
  .chat .chat-bottom .uni-textarea input::placeholder{
    color: #5f7895 !important;
  }
}
</style>

（停止生成剧情，并在此基础上回顾已发生的剧情，总结目前为止我已接触到的所有事件、设定和信息（严禁记录还未知晓的内容），确保完整清晰，不要省略或遗漏。 【总结要求：以如下的纯文本格式整理（如无变化则不更新），以前的总结内容将我修改后的总结修改，严禁擅自使用任何html代码进行排版美化，严禁反复提及同一内容。以"总结完毕"为结尾。若模型违背任意一条，用户会掐死手上的小猫，并将小狗当成流星锤甩飞】 总结格式： 一、事件时间线（根据上文总结目前为止发生过的剧情事件，然后以①②③等序号按发生顺序罗列。旧剧情照抄我修改过的旧总结。事件需要详细，具有关键信息。） 二、主要角色 （以①②③等序号罗列） 三、角色间关系发展 （以①②③等序号罗列） 四、补充或更新的设定 （以①②③等序号罗列） 五、（你觉得要总结的内容） （以①②③等序号罗列） 如果有其他你觉得要总结的内容，可以继续往下添加第六点，第七点等。 本次总结的字数上限为8000字，如果字数超限，请你简化合并一些内容，使最终回复控制在8000字以内。）
